title: A Doll's House
tagline: A woman who has been living like a doll ultimately chooses to leave her home to claim her dignity and freedom.
taglineCn: 一个被当作玩偶活着的女人，最终选择离开家庭，去争取作为人的尊严与自由。
description: One of Henrik Ibsen's most famous plays, A Doll's House is a landmark in theatre history. It is being revived not only because it is a classic, but because the conditions it portrays still exist today.
descriptionCn: 《玩偶之家》是易卜生最著名的作品之一，也是戏剧史上女性觉醒主题的代表作。此次在戏剧节中再次呈现，不只是因为它经典，更因为它所呈现的处境至今仍然存在。
note: In this production, Windmill invites audiences to reinterpret Nora from a contemporary perspective. She is not a traditionally perfect, pure, flawless victim. She calculates, and uses her advantages to pursue what she wants.

title: No Exit
tagline: Hell is other people. A minimalist take on Sartre's existential classic.
taglineCn: 他人即地狱。——对萨特存在主义经典的一次极简演绎。
description: One of Jean-Paul Sartre's most representative plays, No Exit explores the famous proposition that hell is other people, revealing the inescapable structures of gaze, judgment, and mutual shaping between human beings.
descriptionCn: 《禁闭》是让-保罗·萨特最具代表性的戏剧作品之一，揭示了人与人之间无法回避的凝视、评判与相互塑造的关系结构。
note: The production compresses its basic structure to three chairs. Before the performance begins, audience members may enter and interact with the props, changing the stage's initial condition.

title: The Flying Heart
tagline: A stand-up comedy special by Zhaoyang — Windmill's founder, now active on the Silicon Valley comedy scene.
taglineCn: 昭阳——风车剧社创始人、现活跃于硅谷脱口秀舞台——带着巡演作品回到芝加哥。
description: Zhaoyang, founder of Windmill Chinese Drama Club in 2011 and now an active performer on the Silicon Valley stand-up comedy scene, returns to Chicago with his touring show for a reunion in Hyde Park.
descriptionCn: 2011年风车剧社创始人、现活跃于硅谷脱口秀舞台的演员昭阳，将带着自己的巡演作品回到芝加哥，在海德公园完成一次充满情感意味的重逢。
note: A special festival performance. One night only.

title: An Act of Grace
venue: Dong Fang Drama Group Small Theatre
tagline: Three people. Three sets of calculations. A dangerous endgame that twists until the very last line.
taglineCn: 三个人、三种算计、一盘暗流涌动的残局，在不断推进中层层翻转，直到最后一句台词仍保留悬念。
description: Adapted from Canadian playwright John Muggleton's An Act of Grace, this production marks the work's world premiere of the Chinese version. Two middle-aged men appear at the home of a woman they do not know. If this is not a chance encounter, what exactly is the game they speak of?
descriptionCn: 改编自加拿大剧作家John Muggleton的作品An Act of Grace，这是该作的全球中文版首演。剧情围绕三位人物展开：两位多年不见的中年男子，突然出现在一位陌生女子家中。
note: Original playwright John Muggleton will travel to Chicago to attend this Chinese-language premiere.

title: Hidden Treasure
tagline: An unexpected fortune lays bare the greed and absurdity of human nature.
taglineCn: 一笔意外出现的财富，照出了人性的欲望与荒诞。
description: Written by Stan Lai in 2018, Hidden Treasure is a play-within-a-play reconstructing Plautus's ancient Roman comedy A Pot of Gold. A theatre troupe accidentally discovers a wall covered in US currency. A developer and a theatre manager each harbor their own motives.
descriptionCn: 《隐藏的宝藏》是赖声川在2018年创作的一部戏中戏，是对古罗马剧作家普劳图斯《一坛金》的重构与续写。故事中的剧团成员在演出期间意外发现了一整面的美金墙。
note: In this absurd farce, we stand beneath a statue of the gods, moving between reality and illusion.

title: Stone, Sun, Red
groupCn: 芝加哥艺术学院中文剧社
tagline: A struggle over expression and an inquiry into existence — between wit and seriousness.
taglineCn: 一次关于表达的挣扎，也是一场关于存在的追问，并试图在诙谐与严肃之间，让观者体会到轻盈的重量。
description: Set in an age when it has become increasingly difficult to sustain concentration and create, Stone, Sun, Red places painter Mark Rothko, Stan Lai's rioters, and poet Haizi on the same stage.
descriptionCn: 剧目《石头，太阳，红色》以当下这个愈发难以专注创作的时代为背景，将画家罗斯科、赖声川笔下的乱民以及诗人海子置于同一舞台，使他们彼此相遇、彼此叩问。
note: Between color, language, and silence — can art still become the final way out?
